description: 'MAYFLOWER' in unbeatable Terra Nova. A magical place where the land & sea compete for your attention. Picturesque neighborhood ideal for leisurely evening strolls on the dyke trail. This lovely unit, located on the QUIET SIDE of the complex, shows like a SHOW HOME. 9' ceiling on main with a powder room. Features: TRENDY LAMINATED FLOORING, DESIGNER PAINT THRU OUT, EXTENSIVELY UPSCALED KITCHEN & BATHROOMS. Roof replacement (2023), washer/dryer (2023), fridge (2022), hot water tank (2021). Open kitchen WITH HUGE EATING AREA & SLATE TILES. TWO BALCONIES AND SIDE-BY-SIDE DOUBLE GARAGE. Clubhouse with exercise room, whirlpool spa & outdoor swimming pool. Steps to Terra Nova Mall, transit & schools. Spul'u'kwuks Elementary & Burnett Secondary. EASY TO SHOW ! LOOK NO FURTHER AND ACT FAST !
